description_long: This is a section of a metal fence, painted in a reddish-brown color, featuring six vertical posts each topped with a sharply pointed, arrowhead-shaped finial. The fence is constructed with three horizontal rails that connect the vertical posts, providing structural stability and a classic, utilitarian appearance. The pointed tops of the posts serve both as a decorative element and as a deterrent to climbing. The overall design is simple and functional, with no additional ornamentation or embellishments. The fence appears to be made primarily of metal, likely steel or iron, and is suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or around residential properties. The surface finish is matte, and the construction suggests durability and resistance to weather.
description: A reddish-brown metal fence section with six pointed posts and three horizontal rails, featuring arrowhead-shaped finials. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the pointed tops and the depth of the fence, highlighting the arrowhead finials and the three horizontal rails.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all six vertical posts with pointed tops and the full length of the three horizontal rails.
description_view_2: Angled view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the pointed finials and the linear arrangement of the rails.
description_view_3: Direct side view showing the alignment of the posts and rails, with the pointed tops clearly visible.
